summary: Two-phase all_reduce: Phase A line store-and-forward gather into op-internal gather_buffer (mirror all_gather), Phase B multicore N-way tile-sum. 3 kernel files phase-branched via CT arg 0 with unified CT superset (2 accessors reader, 1 accessor writer) to keep dead if-constexpr branches in-bounds.

runtime/ (gitignored firmware tree) was missing; build is a symlink to sibling /localdev/wransom/tt-metal/build. Created runtime -> /localdev/wransom/tt-metal/runtime symlink to mirror build symlink. Fixed JIT firmware link failure (missing firmware_*.ld / tmu-crt0.o).
Full acceptance suite 10/10 PASS on WH (1,8) FABRIC_1D sim; golden suite PASS. All shapes x {bf16,f32}, program_cache, output_tensor paths correct.
